ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve" TEXT /* Sleeve measurement for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Overall length measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the size (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the size (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the size (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type for the size (e.g., Regular, Slim, Relaxed) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of items available in inventory */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color(s) of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the product (e.g., solid, striped, floral) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the product (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the product (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the product (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product size mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the size */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the product */,
  "size_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this size available for the product */,
  "size_availability_date" TEXT /* Date when the size became available */,
  "size_discontinuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Shirts, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the category (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the category (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the category (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* Preferred color of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city for the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state for the order */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country for the order */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Shipping zip code for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "return_address" TEXT /* Return address for the return */,
  "return_city" TEXT /* Return city for the return */,
  "return_state" TEXT /* Return state for the return */,
  "return_country" TEXT /* Return country for the return */,
  "return_zip_code" TEXT /* Return zip code for the return */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned item (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating_explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the rating given */,
  "review_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
